mapper.insert:
insert into platform_rate_history (platform_id, channel_name, current_rate, create_time) values
(#{history.platformId}, #{history.channelName}, #{history.currentRate}, #{history.createTime})
mapper.select: select id, platform_id, channel_name, current_rate, create_time from platform_rate_history where platform_id = #{platformId} and create_time in ( select create_time from platform_rate_history where platform_id = #{platformId} group by create_time order by create_time desc limit 2 ) order by create_time desc, channel_name asc
